title: ICAI CA Final Exams Ab Honge Saal Mein Do Baar From May 2026!
content:
# ICAI CA Final Exams Ab Honge Saal Mein Do Baar From May 2026!

Ek important update hai Chartered Accountancy Final examinees ke liye. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne announce kiya hai ki CA Final Examinations ab saal mein do baar hi conduct kiye jayenge. Yeh decision May 2026 Examination onwards effective hoga.

Previously, CA Final exams teen baar hote the — January, May, aur September mein. Par ab, stakeholder feedback ko dekhte hue, ICAI Council ne yeh schedule change kar diya hai.

*   **Old Schedule:** Exams held thrice a year (January, May, September).
*   **New Schedule (from May 2026 onwards):** Exams will be held twice a year (May and November).
*   **Notification Date:** This important announcement was made on April 6, 2026.
*   The January and September attempts have been discontinued. This change only applies to the CA Final Examination; there are no changes for CA Intermediate or Foundation exams announced in this notification.

Yeh move students ko preparation ke liye ek more structured window provide karega.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=14601)

*Published on: 7 April 2026*
